regional_cost_note: Steel fabricators in Invercargill typically charge $130–$260/m for structural beams installed and $400–$950/m for balustrades. Steel portal frame buildings run $38,000–$85,000+. Southland rates are typically 10–15% below the national average, though remote work may attract travel charges. Always verify the fabricator holds current IQP or SCNZ certification for structural work.
